name: Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C).
2. Grease a shallow 11-inch x 7-inch baking pan with butter.
3. Put butter, sugar, and corn syrup in a large saucepan; stir continuously over medium heat until melted.
4. Remove from heat and stir rolled oats into the melted mixture.
5. Spread half of the mixture in the bottom of the pan to form a thin layer.
6. Press with the back of a spoon to compact the mixture and smooth the top.
7. In a medium bowl, mix dried apricots, dates, and prunes together.
8. Sprinkle the fruit evenly over the top of the packed mixture.
9. Spread remaining mixture on top of the fruit; press again with the spoon.
10. Bake for about 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. Cool for 5 minutes. Using a knife, mark the surface of the mixture to guide cutting.
12. Leave in the pan to cool completely.
13. Cut into squares and lift out with a small spatula.
14. Store in an airtight container in a cool place for up to 1 week.
